title: juglans microcarpa var. stewartii
intro: Juglans microcarpa var. stewartii, also known as Chinese nutmeg, is a variety of the Himalayan walnut tree native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chinese nutmeg include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. It can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
